topics.title: Tom Holland Shares Fred Astaire Biopic Update, Wants to Film Dance Scenes Himself
topics.angle: Tom Holland provided an update on his Fred Astaire biopic, expressing a desire to perform the dance scenes himself.

sources.headline: Tom Holland Shares Fred Astaire Biopic Update, Wants To Film Dance Scenes As Oners: How He Would Have Done It
sources.summary: With a big summer that includes promoting The Odyssey and Spider-Man: Brand New Day, Tom Holland is ready to strap into his dancing shoes for his next role. Nearly five years after he revealed he d be leading a Fred Astaire biopic, the actor recently shared an update on the Paul King-directed, Lee Hall-penned film, as [ ]

topics.title: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to Parasyte Universe With 'Tamiya' Series at Netflix
topics.angle: Director Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the 'Parasyte' universe with a new live-action Netflix series titled 'Parasyte: Tamiya'.

sources.headline: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to Parasyte Universe With Tamiya, Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
sources.summary: Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the Parasyte universe with Parasyte: Tamiya, a new live-action series starring Shioli Kutsuna for Netflix, set to stream in 2027. The series marks another collaboration between Netflix and Yeon ( Hellbound, Parasyte: The Grey ), who developed Parasyte: Tamiya and co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae. Wowpoint, the production company behind Yeon s [ ]

sources.headline: Netflix Reteams With Yeon Sang-ho for Parasyte: Tamiya Series
sources.summary: The 'Parasyte: The Grey' follow-up will star Japanese actress Shioli Kutsuna as the original manga's fan-favorite parasite Ryoko Tamiya — a human, a monster and something in between.

topics.title: Engrossing British Crime Drama Gone Takes the Ol Stiff Upper Lip to New Heights

sources.headline: Engrossing British Crime Drama Gone Takes the Ol Stiff Upper Lip to New Heights

topics.title: The Oppenheimer Screenplay Is Now Available to Buy Online
topics.angle: The complete screenplay for Christopher Nolan's acclaimed film 'Oppenheimer' is now available for purchase online.

sources.headline: The Odyssey Screenplay Is Now Available to Buy Online
sources.summary: Christopher Nolan fans can now bring the filmmaker s latest epic home no 70mm projector required. Nolan s complete script for the blockbuster mythological adventure is listed on Amazon, where it s already a No. 1 bestseller. Published by Faber Faber, the 240-page paperback will officially release on Aug. 4 and is currently available for preorder. [ ]

topics.title: Michael J. Fox: Getting Back to Acting Really Prolonged My Life
topics.angle: Michael J. Fox credits returning to acting with prolonging his life, while continuing his fight against Parkinson's.

sources.headline: John Mayer on Why He Keeps Quietly Funding Brain Research Studies
sources.summary: After visiting a military base where he was moved talking to wounded warriors, the rock star has spent 15 years and millions out of his own pocket backing research on PTSD and veterans health — but still finds time to make a little music.
